narrative:
Leesburg (precinct in Highland County) has 719 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
